$meta.name: Helsa Design Tokens
$meta.description: Flat token set. Each key maps 1:1 to a Tailwind v4 @theme CSS custom property: prefix with '--'. Example: color-primary-500 -> --color-primary-500. Keys ending in --line-height follow Tailwind v4's --text-{size}--line-height convention.
$meta.contrast-note: All contrast ratios below are WCAG relative-luminance ratios vs the stated background. AA: 4.5:1 normal text, 3:1 large text (>=24px or >=19px bold) and non-text UI (WCAG 1.4.11).

color-primary-50.usage: Tinted backgrounds (insight card, ghost button hover). Pair with primary-900 text (13.9:1) or neutral-800.

color-primary-100.usage: Stronger tint, selected states, mascot belly. Pair with primary-900 text (12.1:1).

color-primary-200.usage: Borders on primary-50 surfaces, decorative only.

color-primary-300.usage: Decorative fills, illustration accents. Not for text.

color-primary-500.usage: BRAND green. Large fills, primary button bg, mascot body, progress fill at 100%. Only 2.1:1 on white, so never text/icons on white; on this color use primary-900 text (5.9:1 AA) — never white text.

color-primary-600.usage: Non-text UI on white: progress fills, active tab icons, focus rings, chart line (3.2:1 on white, passes 1.4.11). Not for normal text.

color-primary-700.usage: Text/links on white or neutral-50 (4.6:1 AA). Also primary button bottom edge, and bg for white large-bold text (4.6:1).

color-primary-800.usage: Pressed text states, mascot dark leaf/feet. 7.1:1 on white.

color-primary-900.usage: Text on primary-500 buttons (5.9:1 AA) and on primary-50/100 tints. 12.6:1 on white.

color-accent-50.usage: Streak pill background. Pair with accent-700 text (4.6:1 AA).

color-accent-200.usage: Decorative: mascot cheeks, borders on accent-50.

color-accent-500.usage: STREAK FLAME fill and celebration sparkles. Decorative (2.2:1 on white) — always pair with accent-700 text for the count.

color-accent-600.usage: Flame outline/detail, large-bold text on white only (3.6:1).

color-accent-700.usage: Streak count text on white or accent-50 (5.1:1 / 4.6:1, AA).

color-success.usage: Success text/icons on white (4.6:1 AA). Same as primary-700 — success shares the brand family on purpose.

color-success-soft.usage: Success toast/banner bg. Pair with color-success-strong text (5.9:1 AA).

color-warning.usage: Warning text/icons on white (5.0:1 AA). Used for over-target macro state — informational, never shaming red.

color-warning-soft.usage: Warning banner bg. Pair with color-warning text (4.6:1 AA).

color-danger.usage: Destructive actions & form errors, text/icons on white (4.8:1 AA). Never used for diet feedback.

color-danger-soft.usage: Error field/banner bg. Pair with color-danger-strong text (6.5:1 AA).

color-info.usage: Info icons and non-text UI on white (4.2:1, passes 3:1 UI; borderline for small text — prefer info-strong for body copy).

color-info-soft.usage: Info banner bg. Pair with color-info-strong text (5.8:1 AA).

color-info-strong.usage: Info text on white or info-soft (6.2:1 / 5.8:1, AA).

color-neutral-200.usage: Default borders, dividers, inactive onboarding dots.

color-neutral-300.usage: Stronger borders, secondary-button bottom edge, disabled fills.

color-neutral-500.usage: Decorative icons, inactive tab icons (4.1:1 on white — icon-with-label use, not body text).

color-neutral-600.usage: Secondary/muted body text on white or neutral-50 (6.3:1 AA).

color-background.usage: Page background behind cards (alias of neutral-50).

color-border-strong.usage: 2px input borders, secondary button borders (alias of neutral-300).

color-macro-calories.usage: Calories bar/line fill (green). 3.2:1 on white — passes non-text UI. Numeric labels use primary-700.

color-macro-protein.usage: Protein bar/line fill (blue). 4.2:1 on white. Numeric labels use info-strong.

color-macro-carbs.usage: Carbs bar/line fill (amber). 3.2:1 on white — passes non-text UI. Numeric labels use warning (#b45309).

color-macro-fat.usage: Fat bar/line fill (violet). 5.7:1 on white, also fine for labels.

font-sans.value: ui-rounded, 'SF Pro Rounded', 'Nunito', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
font-sans.usage: Single app-wide stack. ui-rounded/SF Pro Rounded give the friendly look on Apple devices free; 'Nunito' (free, Google Fonts) is an optional self-hosted upgrade for other platforms — ship without it if bundle size matters.

text-sm.usage: Secondary text, input labels, helper text.

text-base.usage: Body text, input values, list items.

text-lg.usage: Button labels, card titles, emphasized body.

text-3xl.usage: Dashboard hero numbers (today's calories), big streak milestones.

font-weight-extrabold.usage: Hero numbers, onboarding headlines, streak count.

radius-xl.usage: Bottom sheets (top corners), insight card, modals.

radius-full.usage: Progress bars, streak pill, avatar, tab-bar center action.

spacing.usage: Tailwind v4 base unit; keep the default numeric scale (1=4px, 2=8px, 3=12px, 4=16px, 6=24px, 8=32px, 12=48px).

spacing-card.usage: Card inner padding (20px for the insight card).

spacing-tabbar.usage: Tab bar height, excluding safe-area inset.

shadow-card.usage: Default card elevation — soft and low.

shadow-raised.usage: Toasts, bottom sheets, tab-bar center action.

shadow-button-primary.usage: Chunky bottom edge of primary button (primary-700). Removed + translateY(4px) when pressed.

shadow-button-secondary.usage: Bottom edge of secondary button (neutral-300). Same pressed behavior.

shadow-focus.usage: Focus ring (primary-600 at 35%) on buttons/inputs, in addition to border color change.

duration-base.usage: Progress bar fill animation, sheet open.

duration-celebrate.usage: Celebration toast enter (scale+fade), streak flame pop.

ease-pop.usage: Micro-celebrations only: slight overshoot for mascot-cheer toast and flame tick-up. Disable overshoot under prefers-reduced-motion.
